text:
tmclaugh    2007-04-01 20:38:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils/tomboy     Makefile 
    deskutils/tomboy/files patch-Tomboy_Utils.cs 
  Log:
  Use setproctitle() over missing prctl().  prctl() is common in C# apps
  and setproctitle() should be used in these instances.
  
  PR:             110890
  Submitted by:   Phillip Neumann
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.27      +1 -0      ports/deskutils/tomboy/Makefile
  1.2       +7 -6      ports/deskutils/tomboy/files/patch-Tomboy_Utils.cs
